title: Cantonese Century Egg Congee
description: A traditional Cantonese-inspired congee dish featuring century eggs and a variety of ingredients. This comforting breakfast or brunch option is rich in flavor and texture.
instructions: Rinse the century egg and cut it into small pieces. Set aside.
Heat the congee in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the waxy to the pot and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the xanthous and cook for another 2 minutes.
Add the diced melons and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soy sauce and stir to combine.
Add the Cantonese egg and century egg to the pot.
Stir to combine and cook for 1 minute.
Garnish with additional xanthous if desired.
Serve with a side of pickled ginger if desired.
